system.effect: This spell will kill 1d6 human-sized creatures or one larger creature per the sorcerer's Sorcery skill ranks (1 at Sorcery 0). The targets must all be located within a 10m radius sphere centered on any point the sorcerer wishes, within range. Each affected creature must throw END 12+ or die immediately.
system.critSuccess: Double the number of affected creatures and double the radius of effect to 20m.
